category_sources: Official Kyoto Tycoon page describes a lightweight database server and network interface to Kyoto Cabinet.
source_facts.description describes a database server interface to Kyoto Cabinet.
display_name_sources: Official dbmx.net Kyoto Tycoon page uses the Kyoto Tycoon display name.
docs_sources: Official Kyoto Tycoon page lists documents including fundamental specifications and command-line utility specifications.
repo_sources: Official Kyoto Tycoon page provides source packages but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official Kyoto Tycoon page describes cache, persistent storage, HTTP protocol, and Kyoto Cabinet integration.
